title: Menu · The Coachman
description: The full Coachman menu — starters, seafood, the charcoal grill, South African traditional dishes, burgers, desserts, the wine cellar and the bar. All prices in Rand, inclusive of VAT.

og.title: The Coachman — Fine dining on the bay
og.description: A fine-dining steakhouse and seafood institution on the beachfront in Gqeberha, South Africa.
